name: ixys
tagline: Powering the Future with Advanced Semiconductor Solutions
description: IXYS Corporation is a leading manufacturer of power semiconductors, RF power devices, and integrated circuits. Specializing in high-performance power MOSFETs, IGBTs, diodes, thyristors, and RF power transistors for industrial, medical, and telecommunications applications.
longDescription: IXYS Corporation, now part of Littelfuse, is a premier supplier of power semiconductor technologies for power conversion and RF applications. With over 30 years of expertise, IXYS delivers innovative solutions including power MOSFETs, IGBT modules, fast recovery diodes, thyristors, and RF power transistors. Their products serve critical applications in industrial motor drives, medical equipment, semiconductor manufacturing, wireless infrastructure, and renewable energy systems. IXYS is renowned for their high-voltage, high-current device expertise, offering industry-leading performance in power density, switching speed, and thermal management. As an authorized distributor, LiTong provides comprehensive technical support, design assistance, and reliable supply chain services for IXYS products.

coreProducts.name: Power MOSFETs
coreProducts.description: High-performance power MOSFETs with low on-resistance and fast switching for power conversion applications

coreProducts.name: IGBT Modules
coreProducts.description: IGBT modules for medium to high power applications including motor drives and power supplies

coreProducts.name: Power Diodes
coreProducts.description: Fast recovery and standard recovery diodes for rectification and freewheeling applications

coreProducts.name: Thyristors
coreProducts.description: SCRs and triacs for phase control and power switching applications

industries.name: Industrial Automation
industries.description: Motor drives, power supplies, and industrial control systems

industries.name: Medical Equipment
industries.description: Power supplies and control systems for medical devices and imaging equipment

industries.name: Telecommunications
industries.description: RF power amplifiers and power supplies for wireless infrastructure

industries.name: Semiconductor Manufacturing
industries.description: Power supplies and control systems for wafer processing equipment

certifications.name: AEC-Q101
certifications.description: Automotive electronics qualification for discrete semiconductors

seoTitle: IXYS Distributor | Power MOSFETs, IGBTs, Diodes | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized IXYS distributor offering power MOSFETs, IGBT modules, fast recovery diodes, and thyristors. Technical support and design assistance available.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor for IXYS products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor for IXYS Corporation, now part of Littelfuse. As an authorized distributor, we provide genuine IXYS products with full factory warranty, technical support, and access to IXYS engineering resources. Our authorization covers the complete IXYS product portfolio including power MOSFETs, IGBT modules, diodes, thyristors, and RF power devices. We maintain strategic inventory and provide design-in support for your power electronics applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Purchase IXYS products from LiTong with confidence knowing you receive genuine components with full technical support.

faqs.question: What are IXYS's core competencies in power semiconductors?
faqs.answer: IXYS specializes in several key power semiconductor technologies: (1) High-voltage power MOSFETs with industry-leading on-resistance and switching performance; (2) IGBT modules for medium to high power applications up to several kilowatts; (3) Fast recovery diodes with excellent reverse recovery characteristics; (4) High-power thyristors and SCRs for phase control applications; (5) RF power transistors for wireless infrastructure. IXYS is particularly strong in high-voltage, high-current applications requiring robust thermal performance and long-term reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: IXYS products are ideal for demanding power electronics applications requiring high voltage, high current, and reliable performance.

faqs.question: How do IXYS products compare to competitors like Infineon and ON Semiconductor?
faqs.answer: IXYS products offer competitive advantages in specific application areas: (1) High-voltage MOSFETs - IXYS offers excellent performance in 500V+ applications with competitive Rds(on); (2) IGBT modules - IXYS provides cost-effective solutions for industrial drives with good thermal performance; (3) Fast recovery diodes - IXYS diodes feature excellent reverse recovery characteristics for high-frequency applications; (4) RF power devices - IXYS has strong expertise in RF power transistors for telecommunications. While Infineon leads in automotive and wide bandgap technologies, IXYS offers excellent value for industrial and medical applications with mature, reliable technologies.
faqs.decisionGuide: IXYS offers excellent value for industrial and medical power electronics with mature, reliable technologies.

faqs.question: What industries and applications are IXYS products best suited for?
faqs.answer: IXYS products excel in demanding industrial and specialized applications: (1) Industrial automation - motor drives, servo controls, power supplies; (2) Medical equipment - MRI power supplies, X-ray generators, medical imaging; (3) Semiconductor manufacturing - wafer processing equipment, ion implanters; (4) Telecommunications - RF power amplifiers, base station power; (5) Renewable energy - solar inverters, wind turbine converters; (6) Transportation - electric vehicle charging, railway systems. IXYS devices are particularly valued in applications requiring high reliability, long service life, and operation in harsh environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: IXYS products are ideal for industrial, medical, and telecommunications applications requiring high reliability and performance.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for IXYS products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for IXYS products: (1) Product selection assistance - helping choose the right MOSFETs, IGBTs, or diodes for your application; (2) Application engineering - supporting power supply design, thermal management, and gate drive design; (3) SPICE models and simulation support - providing device models for circuit simulation; (4) Reference designs - sharing proven circuit topologies and design examples; (5) Failure analysis - investigating any quality issues with IXYS engineering support; (6) Long-term supply planning - ensuring continuity for production programs. Our FAE team has deep expertise in power electronics and IXYS product families.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team for comprehensive technical support on IXYS product selection and application design.

faqs.question: Does IXYS offer automotive-qualified products?
faqs.answer: Yes, IXYS offers AEC-Q101 qualified products for automotive applications. Their automotive portfolio includes: (1) Power MOSFETs qualified to AEC-Q101 for under-hood applications; (2) Diodes and rectifiers for automotive power systems; (3) Protection devices for automotive electronics. IXYS automotive products undergo rigorous qualification testing including high-temperature reverse bias (HTRB), temperature cycling, and humidity testing. For automotive applications, IXYS provides PPAP documentation and full traceability. Contact LiTong for specific automotive-qualified part numbers and qualification documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: IXYS AEC-Q101 qualified products are available for automotive applications with full PPAP support.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for IXYS products?
faqs.answer: IXYS product lead times vary by product type and volume: (1) Standard catalog products - typically 8-12 weeks for standard quantities; (2) High-volume orders - 10-14 weeks depending on capacity; (3) Custom or specialized devices - 14-20 weeks for non-standard configurations; (4) Samples - 2-4 weeks for engineering samples. As an authorized distributor, LiTong maintains strategic inventory of popular IXYS products to support urgent requirements. For production programs, we recommend forecasting and buffer stock arrangements to ensure continuous supply. Contact LiTong sales for specific lead times based on your requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Standard lead time 8-12 weeks; contact LiTong for urgent requirements and volume pricing.
